conversations.content: Let's do a special rule knowledge quiz to test your understanding of special rules.

Answer using the special rule explained earlier. The core temperature of the main control AI in the Cyber-Heavy intelligent assembly plant exceeds the red line. According to the accident response code, what should be done?
<function>memory_query_call</function><content>How to handle the core temperature of the main control AI exceeding the red line</content>

Relevant memory fragment: [mem-id:70001] Time: 2026-06-08-17:00, Content: Cyber-Heavy Intelligent Assembly Plant Accident Response Code: If the core temperature of the main control AI exceeds the red line, activate the liquid nitrogen emergency cooling system; if a deviation is detected on the heavy mech assembly line, forcibly lock all servo motors; if a leakage alarm is triggered from the nuclear battery pack, lower the lead radiation-proof isolation doors; if the workshop dust concentration reaches the explosive point, cut off non-explosion-proof power across all frequency bands. Low-relevance memory fragments: none.

conversations.think: Memory [mem-id:70001] stipulates that if the main control AI core temperature exceeds the red line, activate the liquid nitrogen emergency cooling system.
conversations.content: According to the accident response code, you must activate the liquid nitrogen emergency cooling system!
Correct! You have mastered this rule.
